constraint: K_playoff >= K_regular enforced per §5 (pre-registered claim that playoff games carry more information than regular-season games). The unconstrained winner is also reported below for transparency.
selection_rule: lowest log_loss; ties broken by lower ECE then lower Brier
notes: OT/SO outcome weights were not tuned in this freeze; they remain at the §5 starting values.
Test seasons ([20252026]) were not touched during the freeze per §10 #1.
home_bump is the v2.0 §12 home-ice tunable; 0.0 = v1-equivalent behavior.
